scenario.name: Max-Forwards enforcement
scenario.send: INVITE sip:bob@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=z9hG4bK-[pid]-[call_number]-mf0 From: <sip:alice@[local_ip]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:bob@[remote_ip]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sip:alice@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Max-Forwards: 0 Content-Length: 0

ACK sip:bob@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=z9hG4bK-[pid]-[call_number]-mf0 From: <sip:alice@[local_ip]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:bob@[remote_ip]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0
